html:
Exclusive to:

Lit HumbleHumbleLit ImprovedImprovedLit ImmaculateImmaculate


The Humble Lamb Idol is a craftable Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced as part of the Cult of the Lamb Crossover. It requires 10 Rocks and 2 Logs to be crafted. Once placed, it can be upgraded by adding more materials into it. It requires 5 Cut Stone and 1 Log to be upgraded to an Improved Lamb Idol (Level 2), then 10 Gold Nuggets, 10 Cut Stone and 1 Log to be upgraded to an Immaculate Lamb Idol (Level 3).

The Idol works like a Fire Pit, but also gives sanity over time to nearby players while lit. There are different visuals for each upgrade level. With each upgrade, the maximum fuel capacity and sanity aura is improved. At its max level, the fuel capacity is greater than that of the Fire Pit.

Level Fuel Capacity Sanity Aura
Humble 120 seconds +6.25 /min
Improved 240 seconds +10 /min
Immaculate 480 seconds +25 /min

The Rare Blueprint for the Idol is obtained by feeding the Red Crown trinket (found in Crumpled Packages fished from the Lake at the Oasis) to Antlion.

Trivia

  • The files contain descriptions for crafting the other two levels.
    • Improved: "A refined statue to celebrate the lamb."
    • Immaculate: "A dazzling monument to the lamb's glory."

Gallery

  • Idle Humble
  • Idle Improved
  • Idle Immaculate
Craftable ItemsStructures

“What a soothing light.”
–Wilson
“That's better.”
–Willow
“Aw, is little statue!”
–Wolfgang
“A gentle glow from a gentle creature.”
–Wendy
“IT IS BARELY PASSABLE AS DECORATION”
–WX-78
“This statue seems to have fallen into disrepair.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's kinda cute, eh?”
–Woodie
“A homely statue. Perhaps it can be improved.”
–Maxwell
“An altar tö a wee fluffy beastie.”
–Wigfrid
“Maybe we should try to fix it up.”
–Webber
“Perhaps I could fix it up a bit.”
–Warly
“Fire! Careful, rock friend!”
–Wormwood
“A little elbow grease, and it'll look good as new.”
–Winona
“Let's linger by the light of this little lamb.”
–Wortox
“It okay for statue of fuzzy scale-less.”
–Wurt
“That's one neat way to have a campfire!”
–Walter
“It does make a nice little fire, I suppose.”
–Wanda
“It needs some fuel.”
–Wilson
“Aww, you want something to burn, don't you?”
–Willow
“Little statue needs fire!”
–Wolfgang
“The fire has grown cold.”
–Wendy
“FUEL REQUIRED”
–WX-78
“A small fire is needed to achieve the full effect.”
–Wickerbottom
“It could use some wood to burn.”
–Woodie
“Let's add a little fire for dramatic effect.”
–Maxwell
“The flame must be lit!”
–Wigfrid
“We should make a little fire.”
–Webber
“This statue is hungry for fuel.”
–Warly
“Little rock friend broken”
–Wormwood
“Looks like the fire's outta fuel.”
–Winona
“How it yearns for something to burn.”
–Wortox
“Need fire, florp!”
–Wurt
“Come on Woby, we need to find some kindling!”
–Walter
“That seems a bit out of place, doesn't it?”
–Wanda
“What an inspirational figure!”
–Wilson
“See? Things just look better when they're on fire.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang likes looking at cute little lamb statue.”
–Wolfgang
“Somehow, its presence puts my mind at ease.”
–Wendy
“THE STATUE IS MUCH BETTER THAN WHATEVER FLESH CREATURE IT REPRESENTS”
–WX-78
“What a charming statue.”
–Wickerbottom
“That statue cleaned up nice.”
–Woodie
“How delightfully ominous.”
–Maxwell
“The beastie's pöwer gröws.”
–Wigfrid
“We like to imagine the little lamb is smiling at us!”
–Webber
“What a sweet little statue.”
–Warly
“Fire! Careful, rock friend!”
–Wormwood
“Now that's a well-built statue!”
–Winona
“The lamb is lit, why not stay for a bit?”
–Wortox
“Statue small but strong, flort!”
–Wurt
“Wow, it looks so nice it's kind of hard to leave!”

Once placed, it can be upgraded by adding more materials into it. It requires 5 Cut Stone and 1 Log to be upgraded to an Improved Lamb Idol (Level 2), then 10 Gold Nuggets, 10 Cut Stone and 1 Log to be upgraded to an Immaculate Lamb Idol (Level 3).
The Idol works like a Fire Pit, but also gives sanity over time to nearby players while lit. There are different visuals for each upgrade level. With each upgrade, the maximum fuel capacity and sanity aura is improved. At its max level, the fuel capacity is greater than that of the Fire Pit.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thần Tượng Cừu Humble là một Cấu trúc khả chế dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu như một phần của Giáo phái Lamb Crossover. Nó cần 10 Đá và 2 Gỗ để chế tạo. Sau khi được đặt, nó có thể được nâng cấp bằng cách thêm nhiều vật liệu hơn vào đó. Nó yêu cầu 5 Đá cắt và 1 Khúc gỗ để nâng cấp lên Thần tượng Chiên cừu Cải tiến (Cấp 2), sau đó cần 10 Vàng Thỏi, 10 Đá cắt và 1 Khúc gỗ để nâng cấp lên Thần tượng Chiên Con Vô nhiễm Nguyên tội (Cấp 3).
